overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The journey transitions from a wide street with massive digital billboards, through covered walkways and a distinctive green-lit corridor, ending in a narrow neon-lit downtown street.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with massive overhead digital billboards

events.description: character ascends steps from street level to elevated walkway
moves from open street into covered walkway area with overhead structure

agents.ego_description: walking across a wide street with futuristic traffic and ascending steps into a covered pedestrian area

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving along the street
person crossing the street in front of the character

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements including 'CIRRUS' and 'FERUID' brands
tall modern building with illuminated windows and reflective glass surface
rectangular concrete planters with grass patches on the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at street level in a wide urban intersection dominated by massive overhead digital billboards displaying advertisements. The character crosses the asphalt street with sparse traffic, passes other pedestrians, and ascends concrete steps into an elevated covered walkway with blue neon accents and planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with planters and commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway between modern commercial buildings

entered.detail: concrete and metal overpass structure covering the pedestrian walkway
vertical digital displays on building facades showing various advertisements and brand logos
building with wooden paneling and large glass windows featuring neon signage

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-covered pedestrian walkway lined with concrete planters containing grass patches. The path is flanked by modern commercial buildings with digital advertising screens and illuminated storefronts, while an overhead concrete structure provides partial cover from the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with spiral parking structure and palm trees

events.description: character turns right at intersection near the parking structure
approaches and enters green-lit indoor corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the urban sidewalk, turning right at an intersection, and approaching a building entrance with green lighting

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: distinctive dark multi-level parking garage with horizontal slatted facade
large illuminated billboard displaying a face with text advertisement
tall palm trees lining the street near the parking structure
building entrance emitting bright green light from within

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an urban street passing a distinctive spiral parking structure and palm trees. After turning right at an intersection, they approach a building entrance that emits an unusual bright green light, indicating the entrance to an indoor corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor corridor with bright green ambient lighting

events.description: environment shifts dramatically to bright green artificial lighting
exits green corridor, lighting returns to normal street illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through a brightly lit green corridor, passing other pedestrians including one with distinctive green hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright green hair and glasses walking past the character
group of pedestrians walking ahead in the corridor toward the exit

entered.detail: walls illuminated with bright green light panels creating an otherworldly atmosphere
fluorescent ceiling lights emitting intense green-tinted illumination throughout the corridor
posters on the corridor walls including one prominently displaying 'AVANTE'

segments.scene_description: Walking through a distinctive indoor corridor bathed in intense bright green light from wall panels and ceiling fixtures. The walls feature advertising posters, and several pedestrians are present, including one with distinctive green hair. The character exits the corridor back to a normally lit street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow downtown street with tall buildings and dense neon signage

events.description: exits green corridor into narrow neon-lit street with tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow street lined with towering buildings and neon signs, passing various pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking along the sidewalk
group of pedestrians gathered near a building entrance with green lighting

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and red neon accents rising on both sides
large vertical screens displaying advertisements and brand imagery on building facades
concrete planters with small trees and shrubs along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a narrow downtown street flanked by towering buildings covered in dense neon signs and digital billboards. The street is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and the atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with red and blue neon lighting reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, billboard-dominated urban intersection into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a cyberpunk downtown. It begins at street level, crossing an asphalt intersection under massive digital advertisements before ascending concrete steps into an elevated pedestrian walkway accented with blue neon and greenery. As the camera moves past modern commercial storefronts and a spiral parking structure, the path turns toward a building entrance that transitions the environment into an indoor corridor bathed in intense, monochromatic green light. The scene then shifts back to the outdoors as the character exits the green glow, finally entering a narrow street flanked by towering skyscrapers. This final stretch reveals a crowded cityscape where red and blue neon signs reflect off wet pavement under a dense canopy of digital billboards.
